title: Box Breathing
description: A powerful technique to calm the nervous system and improve focus during intense study blocks.
tip: Follow the expanding circle. Inhale as it grows, hold at the top, exhale as it shrinks.

title: Neck & Shoulder Release
description: Release the tension built up from hours of leaning over a laptop or desk.
tip: Slowly drop your chin to your chest. Roll your head from side to side, feeling the stretch in your traps.

title: Deep Relaxation
description: A guided body scan to help you disconnect and recharge your mental energy.
tip: Close your eyes. Start from your toes and move upward, consciously relaxing every muscle group.

title: 5-4-3-2-1 Grounding
description: Quickly reduce anxiety by engaging your five senses with your immediate environment.
tip: Acknowledge: 5 things you see, 4 you can touch, 3 you hear, 2 you smell, and 1 you can taste.

title: Eye Rest (20-20-20)
description: Reduce digital eye strain by looking at something 20 feet away for 20 seconds.
tip: Look away from the screen. Focus on an object at least 20 feet away to relax your eye muscles.

title: Guided Gratitude
description: Shift your mindset by reflecting on three specific things you are grateful for today.
tip: Think of one small win from today, one person you appreciate, and one thing you're looking forward to.
